findings.title: check-gate-2-exit.sh core logic is essentially untested
findings.suggested_fix: Add integration tests in tests/integration/test-code.sh that: (1) create a mock compliance-review-report.md with BLOCK>0 and assert exit code 1, (2) test VERIFICATION.md generation by inspecting the output file contents, (3) test the missing-decisions validation loop by creating a spec.md with D-XXX entries and verifying they appear in the generated report.

evidence.snippet:
# 2. 检查 compliance-reviewer 通过 (无 BLOCK)
...
    if [ "$COMPLIANCE_BLOCK" -eq 0 ]; then
        ...
    else
        echo -e "${RED}FAIL${NC} compliance-reviewer 发现 $COMPLIANCE_BLOCK 个 BLOCK 级别问题"
        EXIT_CODE=1
    fi

# 生成 VERIFICATION.md 内容
cat > "$PROJECT_DIR/VERIFICATION.md" << EOF
# 验证报告: $FEATURE_NAME
...

# 校验 VERIFICATION.md 中的决策记录
if [ -n "$DECISION_IDS" ]; then
    MISSING_DECISIONS=""
    for DECISION_ID in $DECISION_IDS; do
        if ! grep -q "$DECISION_ID" "$PROJECT_DIR/VERIFICATION.md" 2>/dev/null; then
            MISSING_DECISIONS="$MISSING_DECISIONS $DECISION_ID"
        fi
    done

output=$($PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/check-gate-2-exit.sh --help 2>&1) || output=$($PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/check-gate-2-exit.sh 2>&1 | head -20)

    if [ -n "$output" ]; then
        log_test "CHECK-2 离开脚本执行" "PASS" ...

findings.title: detect-stack.sh missing-directory error path not tested
findings.suggested_fix: Add a test in tests/integration/test-init.sh that passes a non-existent directory to detect-stack.sh and asserts exit code 1 and stderr output.

evidence.snippet:
# 检查目录是否存在
if [ ! -d "$PROJECT_PATH" ]; then
    echo "Error: Directory '$PROJECT_PATH' does not exist" >&2
    exit 1
fi

test_error_handling() {
    ...
    output=$($PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/detect-stack.sh "$test_dir" 2>&1)
    local exit_code=$?

    if [ $exit_code -eq 1 ] && echo "$output" | grep -q "Error"; then
        log_test "错误处理 (无构建工具)" "PASS" ...

findings.title: pattern-scan.sh empty-project and path-with-spaces branches untested
findings.suggested_fix: Add tests in tests/integration/test-code.sh for: (1) an empty directory with no Java files to verify graceful handling of all 'count -eq 0' early returns, (2) a project path containing spaces to ensure find/xargs patterns don't break.

evidence.snippet:
scan_controllers() {
    local controllers=$(find "$PROJECT_PATH" -name "*Controller.java" -type f 2>/dev/null)
    local controller_count=$(echo "$controllers" | grep -v "^$" | wc -l | tr -d ' ')

    if [ "$controller_count" -eq 0 ]; then
        echo "未检测到 Controller 类"
        return
    fi

residual_risks.title: Integration tests are shallow existence/keyword checks for documentation and SKILL.md files
residual_risks.description: Many tests (e.g., test_feature_questions, test_prd_template, test_code_skill) only verify files exist and contain expected keywords. They do not exercise behavioral logic. This is acceptable for static templates but means runtime behavior of the framework is less validated.

residual_risks.title: No isolated unit tests for shell script functions
residual_risks.description: All testing is done at the integration level via full script execution. Individual function behavior in pattern-scan.sh and check-gate-2-exit.sh is not isolated, making it harder to pinpoint failures and leaving some branches uncovered.

testing_gaps.title: check-gate-2-exit.sh compliance parsing fallback branch
testing_gaps.description: The script has two parsing strategies for compliance-review-report.md (YAML front matter vs grep fallback), but tests do not create mock reports to exercise either path.

testing_gaps.title: check-gate-2-exit.sh interactive prompt fallback paths
testing_gaps.description: The script uses 'read ... 2>/dev/null || VAR=default' for non-interactive fallback. These fallbacks are not exercised in CI/non-interactive environments because tests only run --help.

testing_gaps.title: check-gate-2-exit.sh VERIFICATION.md generation and validation
testing_gaps.description: The 100+ lines of logic that generate VERIFICATION.md and validate decision coverage are not covered by any test.
